info.title: Hospital-Doctor Platform API
info.description: Production-ready backend APIs for authentication, doctor and hospital profile management, approval workflows, doctor-hospital mapping, subscriptions, department management, and admin operations.

tags.name: Department Selection
tags.description: Department listing and department management APIs.

tags.name: Doctor Module
tags.description: Doctor profile creation, retrieval, and hospital selection APIs.

tags.name: Hospital Module
tags.description: Hospital profile, pending doctor approvals, and subscription APIs.

tags.name: Schedule Module
tags.description: Doctor scheduling, availability summaries, and patient token assignment APIs.

tags.name: Log Module
tags.description: Frontend and backend log persistence APIs.

tags.name: Admin Module
tags.description: Admin approval, filtering, pagination, and subscription management APIs.

tags.name: Super Admin Module
tags.description: Super admin APIs for managing admin users.

message.example: Status must be pending, approved or rejected

departmentId.description: Required for common_user registration. Optional in current doctor registration flow.

doctorId.description: Doctor profile id is preferred. The backend also accepts the doctor userId for frontend compatibility.
Optional doctor profile id. The backend also accepts the doctor userId for frontend compatibility.

status.description: Preferred values are NOT_STARTED, inprogress, and COMPLETED. CALLING is also accepted as a compatibility alias and is returned by the backend for in-progress tokens.

message.example: Unable to save the doctor schedule.

example.error: This doctor already has an overlapping schedule on the selected date

post.description: Registers a doctor, hospital, common user, or admin in the existing auth flow. All new accounts start with pending approval. OTP is printed in the server terminal for verification.
Validates email and password and blocks users whose approval status is not approved. On success, OTP is generated for login verification.

example.message: OTP sent. Please verify to complete login.
Your account is still pending admin approval

post.description: Verifies login OTP and returns a JWT token.
Generates and sends a fresh OTP for completing email verification after registration.

example.message: A new registration OTP has been sent.

post.description: Generates and sends a fresh OTP for completing login for already approved and email-verified users.

example.message: A new login OTP has been sent.

post.description: Adds a hospital to the doctor's selected list. Duplicate selections are rejected.

get.description: Lists hospitals with optional approval-status filtering, sorting, and pagination.
Only the owning approved hospital account can view this endpoint. If a hospital override exists, it is returned; otherwise the default subscription is used.

post.summary: Create or update a doctor department assignment

get.summary: Legacy alias for get hospital profile

put.summary: Legacy alias for assign or update hospital department

get.description: Returns hospital info, department choices, approved doctors for that hospital, and consultation time options for the doctor schedule frontend.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Defaults to the current server date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

post.description: Creates a doctor availability schedule for an approved doctor of the current hospital. The backend validates department match, past dates, slot generation, and overlapping time ranges.

example.message: This doctor already has an overlapping schedule on the selected date

patch.description: Updates an existing doctor schedule for the current hospital. Schedules that already have assigned patient tokens cannot be edited.

409.description: Schedule cannot be updated because it conflicts or already has tokens assigned

delete.description: Deletes an existing doctor schedule for the current hospital. Schedules that already have assigned patient tokens cannot be deleted.

409.description: Schedule cannot be deleted because patient tokens are already assigned

post.description: Books the earliest available slot for the selected department and date, optionally restricted to a specific doctor, and persists a patient token record.

patch.description: Updates the lifecycle state of a patient token. Preferred request values are NOT_STARTED, inprogress, and COMPLETED. The backend also accepts CALLING as a compatibility alias and returns CALLING for in-progress tokens.

post.description: Persists a frontend or backend log entry in MongoDB. This endpoint is public so pre-login frontend events can also be captured; if a valid bearer token is present, user metadata is attached automatically.

data.message: Unable to generate the patient token.

data.error: No availability found in Cardiology for 2026-04-03

get.description: Lists MongoDB-backed logs with optional filtering by type, origin, source, and search term. Admin or super admin access is required.
Supports filtering by approval status, sorting, and pagination.
Supports filtering by approval status, sorting, and pagination.

patch.description: Updates doctor profile fields. Email updates must use the email change flow.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Doctor profile id or user id

delete.description: Deletes the doctor user and profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Doctor profile id or user id

patch.description: Updates hospital profile fields. Email updates must use the email change flow.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Hospital profile id or user id

delete.description: Deletes the hospital user and profile.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Hospital profile id or user id

post.description: Sends an OTP for verifying a user email change.
Verifies the OTP and updates the user email.

patch.description: Legacy generic approval endpoint. Prefer the doctor and hospital status endpoints for those role-specific flows.
Legacy generic approval endpoint. Prefer the doctor and hospital status endpoints for those role-specific flows.

get.description: Fetches chat messages between an approved doctor and hospital connection.

post.description: Sends a quick or manual chat message for an approved doctor-hospital connection.

patch.description: Updates a chat message. Only the original sender can edit.

delete.description: Deletes a chat message for the doctor-hospital conversation.

patch.description: Marks messages sent by the other participant as read.

delete.description: Deletes all messages for the conversation between the doctor and hospital.
